messages.content: Can you confirm dominator ultra drive in true timber 20Ah is in stock?

We don't currently have a confirmed restock date for the Dominator UltraDrive in True Timber with a 20Ah battery. However, you can call us at (952) 283-0777 during business hours (Mon-Fri 8:30am-4:30pm CST) to be added to our pre-order list when it arrives.
